$schema_note: Project-scoped Claude Code settings for eaiou. PostToolUse hook records Edit/Write/NotebookEdit actions inside the eaiou repo to eaiou's provenance graph (CAUGHT-layer record). Hook is silent on success and silent on eaiou-unreachable; failures log to .claude/hook_errors.log. See /scratch/repos/eaiou-admin/_notes/2026-04-25-claude-code-mcp-integration.md for the Option C bidirectional integration design.
